meta.title: Projects | Jacek Janczura
meta.description: Selected projects from enterprise AI platforms to ML systems-built on AWS and focused on measurable operational impact. Available for architecture reviews, LLM/RAG work, and AI consulting.

hero.title: Projects
hero.subtitle: Selected work across enterprise AI platforms, ML systems, and privacy-first architectures

intro: Selected projects built at {company}, where I serve as Co-founder & CTO.

projects.name: entAIngine
projects.tagline: The AI Engine for Enterprise-Grade Process Automation
description: A multi-tenant SaaS platform for AI process automation: knowledge-aware assistants, document workflows, and deep integration into real back-office operations (not demo workflows).

Built on AWS with event-driven microservices (Lambda, ECS/Fargate, SNS/SQS) and multi-model LLM integrations (OpenAI, Azure OpenAI, Bedrock, Mistral). Designed for high-throughput workloads (>1,000 concurrent connections; thousands of requests per second) with controlled cost and reliability.
Enterprise-grade security and compliance by design: ISO 27001 and SOC 2, with data sovereignty as a first-class requirement.
projects.industries: Production & Manufacturing, Pharmaceutical, Financial Services, Enterprise Operations
projects.tech: AWS Lambda, ECS/Fargate, SNS/SQS, OpenAI, Azure AI Foundry, Bedrock, Mistral, RAG, RBAC
projects.impact: Serving 50+ organizations with 99.9% uptime. ISO 27001/SOC 2 in ~3 months. Production-grade reliability enabling faster AI adoption across enterprise workflows.

projects.name: Prompt Wizard & Testbed
projects.tagline: Enterprise tooling for reliable LLM pipelines
description: Built an internal testing and evaluation framework (Testbed) to make LLM systems measurable and repeatable: deterministic test cases, quantitative + qualitative evaluation, and regression testing for RAG and multi-step pipelines.
Developed "Prompt Wizard" to streamline prompt iteration and optimization — helping teams ship prompts that are robust, versioned, and testable instead of "works on my laptop".
The goal: move prompt engineering from ad-hoc experimentation to engineering discipline — so teams can scale, ship safely, and keep performance stable over time.
projects.industries: Enterprise AI, RAG, Multi-Step LLM Pipelines
projects.tech: LLM Evals, RAG Testing, Deterministic Test Cases, Prompt Engineering, Metrics
projects.impact: Faster iteration without breaking production behavior. Higher confidence in releases. Improved prompt quality via repeatable evaluation.

projects.name: RP-Matcher
projects.tagline: Automated product matching to eliminate manual offer preparation
description: For RP Group (emergency lighting), built a machine-learning system that matches customer inquiries to the best-fitting products — replacing time-consuming expert-driven selection with repeatable ranking.

Built a robust dataset via LLM-assisted extraction (entAIngine API) and domain-specific feature engineering (25+ engineered features). Benchmarked five models with hyperparameter optimization (GridSearchCV).
Best model: tuned Random Forest with 70.7% Top-1 accuracy (MRR 0.835; AUC-ROC 0.923), delivering strong ranking quality while keeping the system interpretable and deployable.
projects.tech: Python, Scikit-Learn, Random Forest, Ensembles, Feature Engineering, LLM-Assisted Extraction
projects.impact: 60% reduction in offer preparation time. Eliminated dependency on domain experts for product selection. Scalable to 80-85% accuracy with more data.

projects.name: Flowhive AI
projects.tagline: All-in-one workspace for leading AI models
description: Unified access to leading AI models (GPT, Claude, Gemini, Llama, Mistral) in a single collaborative workspace. Side-by-side model comparison, deep research with internet-scanning AI agents, and team-wide knowledge management.
Built for teams that need to evaluate, compare, and collaborate across multiple AI providers without switching tools — with agentic workflows and shared context.
projects.tech: Multi-Model Access, Side-by-Side Comparison, AI Agents, Knowledge Management, Team Collaboration
projects.impact: Unified multi-model access for teams. Faster evaluation and comparison. Shared knowledge across the organization.

projects.name: Valuation Engine
projects.tagline: Save 2+ hours per appraisal with AI-driven research
description: An AI platform built for real estate appraisers and valuers to automate the most time-consuming parts of an appraisal: research, location analysis, and report drafting.
Turns hours of manual work into 2–3 minutes of structured output per property with macro/micro location insights, market context, and appraisal-ready report generation.
Designed for professional workflows: multi-source data integration and quality controls to keep outputs consistent and reviewable.
projects.industries: Real Estate Appraisal, Property Valuation, Banking & Collateral Assessment
projects.tech: Real Estate AI, Location Analysis, Market Intelligence, Report Generation, Multi-Source Data
projects.impact: 2+ hours saved per appraisal report. Results in 2–3 minutes per property. Higher consistency and easier review.

projects.name: entAIgent
projects.tagline: Build multi-agent systems without writing code
description: A no-code platform enabling operations teams (customer service, HR, internal ops) to design and run multi-agent workflows without engineering support.
Focused on orchestration and reliability: clear role separation, controlled handoffs, and evaluation hooks so teams can iterate safely and scale outcomes across departments.
projects.industries: Operations, Customer Service, HR Automation, Enterprise Workflows
projects.tech: AI Agents, No-Code, Visual Workflows, Multi-Agent Orchestration, Evals
projects.impact: Faster PoCs and iteration cycles. More consistent outcomes through structured multi-agent coordination.

projects.name: Flowhive VC
projects.tagline: Due diligence and portfolio intelligence — productized
description: A VC-focused platform combining deep research with investment-specific automation to speed up due diligence and market intelligence.
Pre-configured agents support competitive analysis, portfolio intelligence tracking, deal flow automation, and market mapping — turning scattered research into institutional knowledge.
projects.industries: Venture Capital, Angel Investing, Corporate Venture, Investment Analysis
projects.tech: AI Agents, Due Diligence Automation, Portfolio Intelligence, Market Mapping, Deal Flow
projects.impact: Faster deal evaluation cycles. Repeatable research workflows across investment teams.

projects.name: KnowledgeX
projects.tagline: Safe data collaboration without exposing sensitive information
description: An EU Horizon 2020-funded platform enabling organizations to run analytics on private data without taking custody of it — "bring the code to the data" with strong auditability and security.
Designed end-to-end secure workflows (agreement → execution → evaluation) and a modular microservice architecture, plus immutable audit trails via blockchain.
Used confidential computing (TEEs / Intel SGX) and AES-256 encryption for data at rest to support privacy-preserving, inter-organizational processing — validated with EU stakeholders.
projects.industries: Cross-Organizational Analytics, Data Collaboration, Privacy-Sensitive Industries
projects.tech: Ethereum, Solidity, Intel SGX (TEE), iExec, Confidential Computing, IPFS, Microservices
projects.impact: Privacy-preserving cross-organization data processing. Strong auditability for regulated environments. Validated within EU-funded research context (NGI ONTOCHAIN).
